122.reason: [This recursive call assumes p is in the right subtree, but if duplicates exist and p is actually in the left subtree due to insertion logic inconsistency, this will fail. Also, comparing only by value (q->num == p->num) is unsafe when duplicate values exist because multiple nodes can have same value but different addresses.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [This recursive call assumes p is in the right subtree, but if duplicates exist and p is actually in the left subtree due to insertion logic inconsistency, this will fail. Also, comparing only by value (q->num == p->num) is unsafe when duplicate values exist because multiple nodes can have same value but different addresses.]
